[Term]
id: GO:0035738
name: venom-mediated perturbation of biological process
namespace: biological_process
def: "A process by which an organism alters or subverts a biological process in another organism via the action of a venom. Venoms are injected into the prey by a bite or a sting. Venoms cause their biological effects via the many toxins that they contain; some venoms are complex mixtures of toxins of differing types. Venoms can serve as predation mechanisms or defense responses." [Wikipedia:Venom]
synonym: "envenomation" EXACT []
synonym: "envenomation perturbing biological process" EXACT []
synonym: "envenomation resulting in modification of morphology or physiology of other organism" EXACT []
synonym: "envenomation resulting in modulation of process in another organism" EXACT []
synonym: "envenomation resulting in modulation of process in other organism" EXACT []
xref: Wikipedia:Venom
is_a: GO:0035821 ! modulation of process of another organism

property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/29375" xsd:anyURI

def: "A process by which an organism alters or subverts a biological process in another organism via the action of a venom. Venoms are injected into the prey by a bite or a sting. Venoms cause their biological effects via the many toxins that they contain; some venoms are complex mixtures of toxins of differing types. Venoms can serve as predation mechanisms or defense responses." [Wikipedia:Venom]

[Term]
id: GO:0035738
name: venom-mediated perturbation of biological process
namespace: biological_process
def: "A process by which an organism alters or subverts a biological process in another organism via the action of a venom. Venoms are injected into the prey by a bite or a sting. Venoms cause their biological effects via the many toxins that they contain; some venoms are complex mixtures of toxins of differing types. Venoms can serve as predation mechanisms or defense responses." [Wikipedia:Venom]

synonym: "envenomation perturbing biological process" EXACT []
synonym: "envenomation resulting in modification of morphology or physiology of other organism" EXACT []
